---
title: "LMM"
author: "bian"
date: "2025-12-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
source("anovakun_489.txt")
```



```{r}
data = read.csv("all_subjects_combined.csv")

# 将变量转为因子
data$subject <- as.factor(data$subject)

# 要移除的subject
remove_ids <- c()

# 方法1: 使用 %in% 和 !（最常用）
data <- data[!data$subject %in% remove_ids, ]

# condition重新编码：fm → f-kimera, u1m → u1-kimera
data$condition <- gsub(" ", "", data$condition)  # 去掉所有空格
data$condition <- gsub("^fm$", "f-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- gsub("^u1m$", "u1-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- as.factor(data$condition)

data$response <- 1-data$response
# RT转换为秒
data$RT <- data$RT / 1000

# percent反转后缩放：(100 - percent) / 100
data$percent_scaled <- (100 - data$percent) / 100
```


```{r}
df_long <- data %>%
  mutate(
    condition = as.character(condition),
    intimacy = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "f-kimera") ~ "friend",
      condition %in% c("u1", "u1-kimera") ~ "stranger"
    ),
    face_type = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "u1") ~ "normal",
      condition %in% c("f-kimera", "u1-kimera") ~ "chimeric"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    intimacy = factor(intimacy, levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
    face_type = factor(face_type, levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
    subject = factor(subject)
  )
# 确认
df_long %>% count(intimacy, face_type)
```

```{r}
m6 <- lmer(RT ~ poly(percent_scaled, 2)*intimacy*face_type +
               (1 + poly(percent_scaled, 2) | subject), 
           data = df_long)
summary(m6)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)

# 被験者を3人選択（実際のデータに基づいて変更してください）
selected_ids <- c("6")  # データに存在する被験者IDに変更

# ランダム効果を取得
re <- ranef(m6)$subject

# 固定効果の係数を取得
fixed_coefs <- fixef(m6)

# poly変換の係数を保存(一貫性のため)
poly_coefs <- attr(poly(df_long$percent_scaled, 2), "coefs")

# 固定効果の切片と係数
fixed_intercept <- fixed_coefs["(Intercept)"]
fixed_slope1 <- fixed_coefs["poly(percent_scaled, 2)1"]
fixed_slope2 <- fixed_coefs["poly(percent_scaled, 2)2"]

# ドッジ幅を設定
dodge_width <- 0.02  # この値を調整してずらす幅を変更

# ========== 図1: ランダム切片のみ ==========
newdata1 <- expand.grid(
  percent_scaled = seq(min(df_long$percent_scaled), max(df_long$percent_scaled), length.out = 100),
  intimacy = factor("friend", levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
  face_type = factor("normal", levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject))
)

# 固定効果のみの予測
newdata1$fit_fixed <- predict(m6, newdata = newdata1, re.form = NA)

# ランダム切片を取得
intercept_df <- data.frame(
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject)),
  intercept_shift = re[selected_ids, "(Intercept)"]
)

# ランダム切片のみを追加
newdata1 <- newdata1 %>%
  left_join(intercept_df, by = "subject") %>%
  mutate(fit_intercept_only = fit_fixed + intercept_shift)

# 原始データ(friend + normal条件でフィルタリング)
data_selected <- df_long %>% 
  filter(subject %in% selected_ids, 
         intimacy == "friend",
         face_type == "normal") %>%
  group_by(subject, percent_scaled) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

data_selected1 <- data_selected %>%
  left_join(intercept_df, by = "subject")

get_fixed_pred <- function(x_val, newdata_ref) {
  idx <- which.min(abs(newdata_ref$percent_scaled - x_val))
  newdata_ref$fit_fixed[idx]
}

data_selected1 <- data_selected1 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(fit_at_x = get_fixed_pred(percent_scaled, newdata1) + intercept_shift) %>%
  ungroup()

# プロット1
plot1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = data_selected1,
               aes(x = percent_scaled, xend = percent_scaled,
                   y = RT, yend = fit_at_x, group = subject),
               color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4,
               position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(data = data_selected1, 
             aes(x = percent_scaled, y = RT, shape = subject),
             color = "gray60", size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_line(data = newdata1, 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_intercept_only, group = subject),
            linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = newdata1 %>% filter(subject == selected_ids[1]), 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_fixed),
            linewidth = 1.3, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Morph Percentage", y = "Response Time (ms)",
       title = "Random Intercept Only") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


# ========== 図2: ランダム切片 + ランダム1次項(直線のみ)==========
newdata2 <- expand.grid(
  percent_scaled = seq(min(df_long$percent_scaled), max(df_long$percent_scaled), length.out = 100),
  intimacy = factor("friend", levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
  face_type = factor("normal", levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject))
)

newdata2$fit_fixed <- predict(m6, newdata = newdata2, re.form = NA)

poly_matrix <- poly(newdata2$percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)

slope1_df <- data.frame(
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject)),
  intercept_shift = re[selected_ids, "(Intercept)"],
  slope1_shift = re[selected_ids, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)1"]
)

newdata2 <- newdata2 %>%
  left_join(slope1_df, by = "subject") %>%
  mutate(
    fit_linear_only = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                      (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_matrix[, 1]
  )

data_selected2 <- data_selected %>%
  left_join(slope1_df, by = "subject")

data_selected2 <- data_selected2 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    poly_val = poly(percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)[1],
    fit_at_x = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
               (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_val
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# プロット2
plot2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = data_selected2,
               aes(x = percent_scaled, xend = percent_scaled,
                   y = RT, yend = fit_at_x, group = subject),
               color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4,
               position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(data = data_selected2, 
             aes(x = percent_scaled, y = RT, shape = subject),
             color = "gray60", size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_line(data = newdata2, 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_linear_only, group = subject),
            linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = newdata2 %>% filter(subject == selected_ids[1]), 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_fixed),
            linewidth = 1.3, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Morph Percentage", y = "Response Time (ms)",
       title = "Random Intercept + Slope (Linear)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


# ========== 図3: ランダム切片 + ランダム1次項 + ランダム2次項 ==========
newdata3 <- expand.grid(
  percent_scaled = seq(min(df_long$percent_scaled), max(df_long$percent_scaled), length.out = 100),
  intimacy = factor("friend", levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
  face_type = factor("normal", levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject))
)

newdata3$fit_fixed <- predict(m6, newdata = newdata3, re.form = NA)

poly_matrix3 <- poly(newdata3$percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)

slope2_df <- data.frame(
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject)),
  intercept_shift = re[selected_ids, "(Intercept)"],
  slope1_shift = re[selected_ids, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)1"],
  slope2_shift = re[selected_ids, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)2"]
)

newdata3 <- newdata3 %>%
  left_join(slope2_df, by = "subject") %>%
  mutate(
    fit_with_slope2 = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                      (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_matrix3[, 1] + 
                      (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_matrix3[, 2]
  )

# data_selected3の計算部分を修正
data_selected3 <- data_selected %>%
  left_join(slope2_df, by = "subject")

# poly_valsをリストではなく直接計算
data_selected3 <- data_selected3 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    poly_val1 = poly(percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)[1],
    poly_val2 = poly(percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)[2],
    fit_at_x = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
               (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_val1 + 
               (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_val2
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# プロット3
plot3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = data_selected3,
               aes(x = percent_scaled, xend = percent_scaled,
                   y = RT, yend = fit_at_x, group = subject),
               color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4,
               position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(data = data_selected3, 
             aes(x = percent_scaled, y = RT, shape = subject),
             color = "gray60", size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_line(data = newdata3, 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_with_slope2, group = subject),
            linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = newdata3 %>% filter(subject == selected_ids[1]), 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_fixed),
            linewidth = 1.3, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Morph Percentage", y = "Response Time (ms)",
       title = "Random Intercept + Slopes (Linear + Quadratic)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


# ========== 図4: ランダム切片 + ランダム2次項のみ(対称)==========
newdata4 <- expand.grid(
  percent_scaled = seq(min(df_long$percent_scaled), max(df_long$percent_scaled), length.out = 100),
  intimacy = factor("friend", levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
  face_type = factor("normal", levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject))
)

newdata4$fit_fixed <- predict(m6, newdata = newdata4, re.form = NA)

poly_matrix4 <- poly(newdata4$percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)

quad_only_df <- data.frame(
  subject = factor(selected_ids, levels = levels(df_long$subject)),
  intercept_shift = re[selected_ids, "(Intercept)"],
  slope2_shift = re[selected_ids, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)2"]
)

newdata4 <- newdata4 %>%
  left_join(quad_only_df, by = "subject") %>%
  mutate(
    fit_quad_symmetric = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                         (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_matrix4[, 2]
  )

data_selected4 <- data_selected %>%
  left_join(quad_only_df, by = "subject")

data_selected4 <- data_selected4 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    poly_val2 = poly(percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)[2],
    fit_at_x = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
               (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_val2
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# プロット4
plot4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = data_selected4,
               aes(x = percent_scaled, xend = percent_scaled,
                   y = RT, yend = fit_at_x, group = subject),
               color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4,
               position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(data = data_selected4, 
             aes(x = percent_scaled, y = RT, shape = subject),
             color = "gray60", size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_line(data = newdata4, 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_quad_symmetric, group = subject),
            linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = newdata4 %>% filter(subject == selected_ids[1]), 
            aes(x = percent_scaled, y = fit_fixed),
            linewidth = 1.3, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Morph Percentage", y = "Response Time (ms)",
       title = "Random Intercept + Quadratic (Symmetric)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# プロットを表示
print(plot1)
print(plot2)
print(plot3)
print(plot4)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)

# ランダム効果と固定効果を取得
re <- ranef(m6)$subject
fixed_coefs <- fixef(m6)
poly_coefs <- attr(poly(df_long$percent_scaled, 2), "coefs")
fixed_intercept <- fixed_coefs["(Intercept)"]
fixed_slope1 <- fixed_coefs["poly(percent_scaled, 2)1"]
fixed_slope2 <- fixed_coefs["poly(percent_scaled, 2)2"]

cat("========== friend + normal 条件で誤差を計算 ==========\n\n")

# 誤差を保存するリスト
error_results <- list()

# 各被験者について誤差を計算
for (i in 1:20) {
  
  subj_id <- as.character(i)
  
  # データをフィルタリング
  data_check <- df_long %>%
    filter(as.character(subject) == subj_id,
           as.character(intimacy) == "friend",
           as.character(face_type) == "normal")
  
  if (nrow(data_check) == 0) next
  
  # データを集約
  data_selected <- data_check %>%
    group_by(percent_scaled) %>%
    summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # ランダム効果を取得
  intercept_shift <- re[subj_id, "(Intercept)"]
  slope1_shift <- re[subj_id, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)1"]
  slope2_shift <- re[subj_id, "poly(percent_scaled, 2)2"]
  
  # poly変換を一度だけ実行
  poly_matrix <- poly(data_selected$percent_scaled, 2, coefs = poly_coefs)
  
  # 各予測モデルの予測値を計算
  data_selected <- data_selected %>%
    mutate(
      # 固定効果のみ
      pred_fixed = fixed_intercept + 
                   fixed_slope1 * poly_matrix[, 1] + 
                   fixed_slope2 * poly_matrix[, 2],
      
      # ランダム切片のみ
      pred_intercept = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                       fixed_slope1 * poly_matrix[, 1] + 
                       fixed_slope2 * poly_matrix[, 2],
      
      # ランダム切片 + 1次
      pred_linear = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                    (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_matrix[, 1] + 
                    fixed_slope2 * poly_matrix[, 2],
      
      # ランダム切片 + 1次 + 2次（フルモデル）
      pred_full = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                  (fixed_slope1 + slope1_shift) * poly_matrix[, 1] + 
                  (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_matrix[, 2],
      
      # ランダム切片 + 2次のみ
      pred_quad = (fixed_intercept + intercept_shift) + 
                  fixed_slope1 * poly_matrix[, 1] + 
                  (fixed_slope2 + slope2_shift) * poly_matrix[, 2]
    )
  
  # 各モデルの誤差を計算
  error_fixed <- sqrt(mean((data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_fixed)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  error_intercept <- sqrt(mean((data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_intercept)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  error_linear <- sqrt(mean((data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_linear)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  error_full <- sqrt(mean((data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_full)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  error_quad <- sqrt(mean((data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_quad)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  # 平均絶対誤差（MAE）
  mae_fixed <- mean(abs(data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_fixed), na.rm = TRUE)
  mae_intercept <- mean(abs(data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_intercept), na.rm = TRUE)
  mae_linear <- mean(abs(data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_linear), na.rm = TRUE)
  mae_full <- mean(abs(data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_full), na.rm = TRUE)
  mae_quad <- mean(abs(data_selected$RT - data_selected$pred_quad), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 相関係数
  cor_fixed <- cor(data_selected$RT, data_selected$pred_fixed, use = "complete.obs")
  cor_intercept <- cor(data_selected$RT, data_selected$pred_intercept, use = "complete.obs")
  cor_linear <- cor(data_selected$RT, data_selected$pred_linear, use = "complete.obs")
  cor_full <- cor(data_selected$RT, data_selected$pred_full, use = "complete.obs")
  cor_quad <- cor(data_selected$RT, data_selected$pred_quad, use = "complete.obs")
  
  cat("被験者", subj_id, ":\n")
  cat("  図1(切片のみ)    - RMSE:", round(error_intercept, 2), ", MAE:", round(mae_intercept, 2), ", r:", round(cor_intercept, 3), "\n")
  cat("  図2(切片+1次)    - RMSE:", round(error_linear, 2), ", MAE:", round(mae_linear, 2), ", r:", round(cor_linear, 3), "\n")
  cat("  図3(切片+1次+2次)- RMSE:", round(error_full, 2), ", MAE:", round(mae_full, 2), ", r:", round(cor_full, 3), "\n")
  cat("  図4(切片+2次)    - RMSE:", round(error_quad, 2), ", MAE:", round(mae_quad, 2), ", r:", round(cor_quad, 3), "\n\n")
  
  error_results[[length(error_results) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    subject = subj_id,
    rmse_fixed = error_fixed,
    rmse_intercept = error_intercept,
    rmse_linear = error_linear,
    rmse_full = error_full,
    rmse_quad = error_quad,
    mae_fixed = mae_fixed,
    mae_intercept = mae_intercept,
    mae_linear = mae_linear,
    mae_full = mae_full,
    mae_quad = mae_quad,
    cor_fixed = cor_fixed,
    cor_intercept = cor_intercept,
    cor_linear = cor_linear,
    cor_full = cor_full,
    cor_quad = cor_quad,
    n_points = nrow(data_selected)
  )
}

# 結果を統合
error_df <- bind_rows(error_results)

cat("\n========== 総合結果 ==========\n\n")

# 各モデルごとに誤差が小さい順にソート
cat("【図1: ランダム切片のみ】RMSE が小さい順:\n")
top_intercept <- error_df %>% arrange(rmse_intercept) %>% select(subject, rmse_intercept, mae_intercept, cor_intercept)
print(head(top_intercept, 10))

cat("\n【図2: ランダム切片 + 1次】RMSE が小さい順:\n")
top_linear <- error_df %>% arrange(rmse_linear) %>% select(subject, rmse_linear, mae_linear, cor_linear)
print(head(top_linear, 10))

cat("\n【図3: ランダム切片 + 1次 + 2次（フルモデル）】RMSE が小さい順:\n")
top_full <- error_df %>% arrange(rmse_full) %>% select(subject, rmse_full, mae_full, cor_full)
print(head(top_full, 10))

cat("\n【図4: ランダム切片 + 2次のみ】RMSE が小さい順:\n")
top_quad <- error_df %>% arrange(rmse_quad) %>% select(subject, rmse_quad, mae_quad, cor_quad)
print(head(top_quad, 10))

# 総合評価（全モデルの平均誤差）
error_df <- error_df %>%
  mutate(
    avg_rmse = (rmse_intercept + rmse_linear + rmse_full + rmse_quad) / 4,
    avg_mae = (mae_intercept + mae_linear + mae_full + mae_quad) / 4,
    avg_cor = (cor_intercept + cor_linear + cor_full + cor_quad) / 4
  )

cat("\n\n========== 【最終推奨】総合評価（全モデルの平均RMSE） ==========\n")
best_overall <- error_df %>% 
  arrange(avg_rmse) %>% 
  select(subject, avg_rmse, avg_mae, avg_cor, rmse_intercept, rmse_linear, rmse_full, rmse_quad)

print(head(best_overall, 10))

cat("\n\n【最も推奨される3つのID】:\n")
top3_ids <- head(best_overall$subject, 3)
cat("ID: ", paste(top3_ids, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("\nこれらの被験者は、すべての図（図1〜4）で最も誤差が小さいです。\n")

# 詳細情報
cat("\n詳細情報:\n")
for (i in 1:min(3, nrow(best_overall))) {
  subj <- best_overall$subject[i]
  cat(sprintf("  %d. 被験者 %s: 平均RMSE = %.2f, 平均MAE = %.2f, 平均相関 = %.3f\n", 
              i, subj, best_overall$avg_rmse[i], best_overall$avg_mae[i], best_overall$avg_cor[i]))
}

# 視覚化
cat("\n\n========== 誤差の視覚化 ==========\n")

# RMSEのヒストグラム
p1 <- ggplot(error_df, aes(x = avg_rmse)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(data = error_df %>% filter(subject %in% top3_ids),
             aes(xintercept = avg_rmse), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Average RMSE (Top 3 in Red)",
       x = "Average RMSE", y = "Count") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

print(p1)

# 各モデルのRMSE比較
error_long <- error_df %>%
  select(subject, rmse_intercept, rmse_linear, rmse_full, rmse_quad) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -subject, names_to = "model", values_to = "rmse") %>%
  mutate(
    model = factor(model, 
                   levels = c("rmse_intercept", "rmse_linear", "rmse_full", "rmse_quad"),
                   labels = c("Intercept Only", "Intercept + Linear", "Full Model", "Intercept + Quad"))
  )

p2 <- ggplot(error_long %>% filter(subject %in% top3_ids), 
             aes(x = model, y = rmse, color = subject, group = subject)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "RMSE Comparison for Top 3 Subjects",
       x = "Model", y = "RMSE", color = "Subject") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

print(p2)
```

```{r}
# 取得預測值（三向交互作用）
pred <- as.data.frame(ggpredict(m6, terms = c("percent_scaled [all]", "intimacy", "face_type")))

data_plot <- df_long %>%
  select(percent_scaled, intimacy, face_type, RT) %>%
  dplyr::rename(y = RT,
                facet = face_type)

# 設定因子標籤（讓圖更好看）
pred$group <- factor(pred$group, 
                     levels = c("friend", "stranger"),
                     labels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
pred$facet <- factor(pred$facet, 
                     levels = c("normal", "chimeric"),
                     labels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

data_plot$intimacy <- factor(data_plot$intimacy, 
                              levels = c("friend", "stranger"),
                              labels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
data_plot$facet <- factor(data_plot$facet, 
                           levels = c("normal", "chimeric"),
                           labels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

# APA 格式繪圖
ggplot() +
  # 平均值 ± SE
  stat_summary(data = data_plot, 
               aes(x = percent_scaled, y = y, color = intimacy),
               fun = mean, 
               fun.min = function(x) mean(x) - sd(x)/sqrt(length(x)),
               fun.max = function(x) mean(x) + sd(x)/sqrt(length(x)),
               geom = "pointrange", 
               size = 0.25,
               linewidth = 0.4,
               alpha = 0.5,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.03)) +
  # 信賴區間
  geom_ribbon(data = pred,
              aes(x = x, ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group), 
              alpha = 0.2) +
  # 預測線
  geom_line(data = pred,
            aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group), 
            linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "Morph Level", 
       y = "RT (ms)",
       color = "Intimacy",
       fill = "Intimacy") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Friend" = "#D55E00", "Stranger" = "#0072B2")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Friend" = "#D55E00", "Stranger" = "#0072B2")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 12),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5)
  )
```
```{r}
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent_scaled >= 0 & percent_scaled <= 0.3 ~ "low",
    percent_scaled >= 0.35 & percent_scaled <= 0.65 ~ "middle",
    percent_scaled >= 0.70 & percent_scaled <= 1 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_group, levels = c("low", "middle", "high")))
```

```{r}
# 筛选 low 的数据
rtlow_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low") %>% 
  group_by(subject, order, intimacy, face_type,PI20) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cor.test(rtlow_anovadata$RT,rtlow_anovadata$PI20)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

ggplot(rtlow_anovadata, aes(x = PI20, y = RT)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "darkred", se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(
    method = "pearson", 
    label.x.npc = "left", 
    label.y.npc = "top",
    cor.coef.name = "r"  # ここで小文字の r に変更
  ) +
  facet_grid(intimacy ~ face_type) + 
  labs(title = "Low: RT-PI20",
       x = "PI20 Score",
       y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
# 筛选 middle 的数据
rtmiddle_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle") %>% 
  group_by(subject, order, intimacy, face_type,PI20) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cor.test(rtmiddle_anovadata$RT,rtmiddle_anovadata$PI20)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

# 1. 分面散点图 + 回归线 (查看 PI20 与 RT 在四种条件下的相关性)
ggplot(rtmiddle_anovadata, aes(x = PI20, y = RT)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "darkred",se = FALSE) +
  # 核心步骤：按照 intimacy 和 face_type 分成 2x2 的四张图
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top",cor.coef.name = "r") +
  facet_grid(intimacy ~ face_type) + 
  labs(title = "Middle: RT-PI20",
       x = "PI20 Score",
       y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() + 
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # 去掉主网格线
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()  # 去掉次网格线
    )
```

```{r}
# 筛选 high 的数据
rthigh_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high") %>% 
  group_by(subject, order, intimacy, face_type,PI20) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cor.test(rthigh_anovadata$RT,rthigh_anovadata$PI20)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

# 1. 分面散点图 + 回归线 (查看 PI20 与 RT 在四种条件下的相关性)
ggplot(rthigh_anovadata, aes(x = PI20, y = RT)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "darkred",se = FALSE) +
  # 核心步骤：按照 intimacy 和 face_type 分成 2x2 的四张图
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top",cor.coef.name = "r") +
  facet_grid(intimacy ~ face_type) + 
  labs(title = "High: RT-PI20 ",
       x = "PI20 Score",
       y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() + 
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # 去掉主网格线
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()  # 去掉次网格线
    )
```


```{r}
rt0_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, order,intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt0_anovadata, "AsBCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```

```{r}
rt0_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, order,intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
# 直接筛选percent_scaled为0、0.5和1的数据
rt0_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  filter(percent_scaled %in% c(0, 0.7, 1)) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_scaled, levels = c(0, 0.7, 1))) %>%
  group_by(subject, order, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 执行ANOVA
anovakun(rt0_anovadata, "AsBCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("intimacy", "face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE, cin = TRUE, auto = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# データフレームを作成
rt_sum_order <- data.frame(
  order = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "f", "f", "f",
                "f", "f", "f", "f", "f", "f",
                "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera",
                "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera", "f-kimera"), 1),
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 2),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 8),
  RT = c(717.7237, 987.8537, 967.4915, 637.2759, 826.4686, 912.4098,
         592.7113, 811.9968, 834.4453, 623.5346, 835.3166, 892.6063,
         743.3076, 1076.0363, 1172.8329, 747.0731, 1072.9889, 1115.1073,
         634.6877, 917.8734, 1027.8278, 675.7577, 950.3900, 1115.2400),
  ci_lower = c(637.9145, 886.1228, 856.9610, 565.6808, 750.4761, 784.8087,
               496.0444, 719.4227, 734.5947, 544.2474, 713.1356, 737.2921,
               631.2628, 915.6619, 847.5330, 606.8007, 878.8472, 1001.5488,
               502.3655, 718.8087, 806.3046, 530.9714, 715.7083, 893.6186),
  ci_upper = c(797.5328, 1089.5847, 1078.0220, 708.8710, 902.4610, 1040.0110,
               689.3783, 904.5710, 934.2959, 702.8218, 957.4976, 1047.9205,
               855.3524, 1236.4108, 1498.1328, 887.3456, 1267.1306, 1228.6659,
               767.0098, 1116.9380, 1249.3510, 820.5441, 1185.0717, 1336.8614)
)

# 因子レベルの設定
rt_sum_order$percent_group <- factor(rt_sum_order$percent_group, 
                                      levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
rt_sum_order$intimacy <- factor(rt_sum_order$intimacy, 
                                 levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
rt_sum_order$face_type <- factor(rt_sum_order$face_type,
                                  levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))
rt_sum_order$order <- factor(rt_sum_order$order,
                              levels = c("f", "f-kimera"),
                              labels = c("Normal-first", "Chimeric-first"))

# 色の定義
colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE",
            "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")

# プロット作成（2x2のレイアウト）
ggplot(rt_sum_order, aes(x = percent_group, y = RT, 
                         color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_grid(order ~ face_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(450, 1550), breaks = seq(500, 1500, 200)) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )

ggsave("RT_with_order.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
rt1_anovadata <- df_long %>% 
  filter(intimacy == "friend") %>%  # 只保留friend条件
  filter(face_type == "normal") %>%  # 只保留friend条件
  group_by(subject, order, percent_group) %>% 
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt1_anovadata, "AsB", long = TRUE, 
         between = "order", 
         within = c("percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT", 
         peta = TRUE, 
         cin = TRUE, 
         auto = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# 筛选 percent_scaled 为 0 的数据
rt100_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  filter(percent_scaled == 1) %>%  # 只保留 percent_scaled 为 0 的数据
  group_by(subject, order, intimacy, face_type) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


```{r}
# 进行 4 要因分散分析
# A: subject (被験者間)
# s: order (被験者間)
# B: intimacy (被験者内)
# C: face_type (被験者内)
anovakun(rt100_anovadata, 
         "AsBC",
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",                    # 被験者間要因
         within = c("intimacy", "face_type"),  # 被験者内要因
         dv = "RT",                            # 従属変数
         peta = TRUE,                          # 偏イータ二乗を計算
         cin = TRUE,                           # 信頼区間を表示
         auto = TRUE)                          # 自動設定
```

```{r}
# 数据过滤：只保留middle和low组
df_long_filtered <- df_long %>%
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent_scaled >= 0 & percent_scaled <= 0.3 ~ "low",
    percent_scaled >= 0.35 & percent_scaled <= 0.65 ~ "middle",
    percent_scaled >= 0.70 & percent_scaled <= 1 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_group, levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))) %>%
  filter(percent_group %in% c("low", "middle"))  # 只保留low和middle组

# 重新设置factor levels（去掉不需要的high level）
df_long_filtered <- df_long_filtered %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_group, levels = c("low", "middle")))

# ANOVA分析
rt0_anovadata <- df_long_filtered %>%
  group_by(subject, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt0_anovadata, "sABC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         within = c("intimacy", "face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE, cin = TRUE, auto = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rt_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt_anovadata, "sABC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# anovakun の結果から手動でデータフレームを作成
rt_sum <- data.frame(
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 1),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 2),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 4),
  RT = c(730.5156, 1031.9450, 1070.1622, 692.1745, 949.7287, 1013.7586,
         613.6995, 864.9351, 931.1365, 649.6462, 892.8533, 1003.9231),
  ci_lower = c(662.8596, 945.6568, 914.4344, 620.9999, 851.7117, 934.9449,
               536.3798, 765.8290, 820.7198, 572.5328, 773.6222, 880.0605),
  ci_upper = c(798.1716, 1118.2333, 1225.8900, 763.3491, 1047.7457, 1092.5723,
               691.0192, 964.0412, 1041.5533, 726.7596, 1012.0845, 1127.7857)
)

# 因子レベルの設定
rt_sum$percent_group <- factor(rt_sum$percent_group, 
                                levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
rt_sum$intimacy <- factor(rt_sum$intimacy, 
                           levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
rt_sum$face_type <- factor(rt_sum$face_type,
                            levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

# 色の定義
colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE",
            "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")

# プロット作成
ggplot(rt_sum, aes(x = percent_group, y = RT, 
                   color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ face_type, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(500, 1250), breaks = seq(500, 1200, 100)) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )

ggsave("RT.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# --- データ準備 (変更なし) ---
rt_sum <- data.frame(
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 1),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 2),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 4),
  RT = c(730.5156, 1031.9450, 1070.1622, 692.1745, 949.7287, 1013.7586,
         613.6995, 864.9351, 931.1365, 649.6462, 892.8533, 1003.9231),
  ci_lower = c(662.8596, 945.6568, 914.4344, 620.9999, 851.7117, 934.9449,
               536.3798, 765.8290, 820.7198, 572.5328, 773.6222, 880.0605),
  ci_upper = c(798.1716, 1118.2333, 1225.8900, 763.3491, 1047.7457, 1092.5723,
               691.0192, 964.0412, 1041.5533, 726.7596, 1012.0845, 1127.7857)
)

rt_sum$percent_group <- factor(rt_sum$percent_group, 
                               levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
rt_sum$intimacy <- factor(rt_sum$intimacy, 
                          levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
rt_sum$face_type <- factor(rt_sum$face_type,
                           levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE", "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.15)

# --- プロット作成 (Y軸の上限を少し調整) ---
p <- ggplot(rt_sum, aes(x = percent_group, y = RT, 
                        color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6, position = pd) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, position = pd) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = pd) +
  facet_wrap(~ face_type, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(500, 1350), breaks = seq(500, 1300, 100)) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )

print(p)
```
